title: Sine of a negative angle
text: Recall the property of the sine function for negative angles: $$\sin(-x)$$ $$=$$ $$-\sin(x)$$. Apply this to each term.

title: Apply negative angle identity
text: Rewrite \sin(-1**{\circ}) using the negative angle identity.

title: Combine like terms
text: Once both terms are simplified using the negative angle identity, combine them.
